title: Unmanned energy refinery
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''unmanned energy refinery''' was a type of deep space industrial plant.

==Characteristics==
The refineries were used to manufacture subatomic knots of space-time essential as components in gravitational devices used throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], like [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generators, [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial compensators]] and [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors. These facilities were enormous, as they were constructed around [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-04-23 -->''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''
*<!-- 2007-03-19 -->''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]''
